title: Physician Assistants
description: Provide healthcare services typically performed by a physician, under the supervision of a physician. Conduct complete physicals, provide treatment, and counsel patients. May, in some cases, prescribe medication. Must graduate from an accredited educational program for physician assistants.

tasks.text: Make tentative diagnoses and decisions about management and treatment of patients.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Interpret diagnostic test results for deviations from normal.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prescribe therapy or medication with physician approval.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Obtain, compile, and record patient medical data, including health history, progress notes, and results of physical examination.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Examine patients to obtain information about their physical condition.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Administer or order diagnostic tests, such as x-ray, electrocardiogram, and laboratory tests.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Instruct and counsel patients about prescribed therapeutic regimens, normal growth and development, family planning, emotional problems of daily living, and health maintenance.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Perform therapeutic procedures, such as injections, immunizations, suturing and wound care, and infection management.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Visit and observe patients on hospital rounds or house calls, updating charts, ordering therapy, and reporting back to physician.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Provide physicians with assistance during surgery or complicated medical procedures.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Supervise and coordinate activities of technicians and technical assistants.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Order medical and laboratory supplies and equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
